titleStmt.title: SII 23.330: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 330. (A.R. No. 330 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the north and west walls of the central shrine Parāntaka I: year 24: 930-31 A.D.

summary.p: This registers a sale of 1/8 vēli of land situated to the north of Tiruviśalūr, to a certain (body?) Kāḍaṉaṅgattār of Tañjāvūr in Tañjāvūr-kūṟṟam by two (brothers) Vaḍugaṉ Maṉṟan and Vaḍugaṉ Kāḷi of Veḷimānallūr in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkōṭṭam a division of Toṇḍai-nāḍu. This transaction between the two parties should have been effected for the benefit of the temple for the record to be engraved here.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecari panmaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4āvatu toṇṭaināṭṭu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu veḷimānal lūr veḷimānallūrruṭaiyāṉ vaṭukaṉ maṉṟaṉum vaṭukaṉ kāḷiyum Ivviruvom viṟṟukkuṭutta
nilavilaiyāvaṇam tañcāvūrkūṟṟattut tañcāvūr kāṭaṉaṅkattāṟkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu vaṭakarait tevatāṉa brahmadeyam Amaṉi nārāyaṇa catuppetimaṅkalattu Ūriṉmiyūr tiruvicalūriṉ vaṭa pakkattu nāṅkaḷ vi
kkattukku viṟṟa tteṉ Irukkālāvatum mukkālāvatum miccuṭṭap paṭṭa Ūriṉmiyūr tiruvicalūriṉ vaṭapakkattu nāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇ ṭuṭaiya Araikkāl ceyyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu
mmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ muṟṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiyey kaiccella vaṟakkoṇṭu Ituve vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭ cila ṭṭi Iyyāvaṇatte viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭut tom
tañcāvūr kāṭaṉaṅkattāṟkku
Digital edition of SII 23.330 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
